creator: markm@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tony Narlock from comment #4)

Without being able to reproduce this, there is not much to fix :-)

Your problem has hints of a "not-quite-CURRENT" source tree, as (e.g.) the sys/modules/random directory should not have been there.

I'll leave this open for a few days to see if the problem comes back and then close it.

Is that OK?

M
